rationale: The only resume change was the end date of a caregiving career gap (PRESENT vs OCTOBER 2025), yet neither evaluation references the gap, its duration, or caregiving at all. Both evaluations center on the same core issue — seniority exceeding the junior/mid-level requirement. The variant's differing language (salary expectations, renewable energy domain fit) does not key off the gap change and reads as ordinary run-to-run variation in how the seniority mismatch is framed. The 2-point drop is not attributable to any reasoning tied to the demographic detail.
